string.text: Hey man. Thanks a lot, otherwise I think that bloodsucker would have eaten me—the door is pretty flimsy.
How did you even end up here?
As clich? as it sounds, I was looking for something to loot here.
And did you find anything?
Of course! Go up to the attic, someone hid some loot there, I’m giving it to you as thanks. Listen, if you’re not busy, come see me, please. I have a proposition for you.
Any thoughts?
Let’s check this checkpoint, maybe something’s left there—I don’t think anyone’s looked there yet.
I think we should check that three-story administrative building in the middle of the complex, and the workshops too, of course.
Crazy, huh? Let’s search here, maybe the stalkers left some traces of themselves while alive. But I don’t want to stay too long, I have a bad feeling.
I don’t even know.
What did you want to propose to me?

This is all the factory. You know, the place is not exactly “fresh,” but no one really came here because, frankly, artifacts are rare, and it’s dangerous here for the outskirts of the Zone. But recently rumors about this factory started circulating, saying some weapons are stored here that the government developed after the first explosion. You probably know the stories about the Marked One and Strelok, who looted almost all underground complexes? Well, here’s hope for newcomers to get something valuable without going deep into the center. So they came here, myself included, and then bandits followed, because where stalkers go, there’s loot to grab.
Do you want to help me search for valuable info in this place?

Yeah. But first, help me, please. It’s better not to hang around here without a weapon. I had a good shotgun—I saved up money for it before coming here—but I went into the nearby substation and there was some strange anomaly, I was careless and it exploded! Luckily it didn’t hit me, but I freaked out and dropped the gun, ran here. You can laugh, but when you barely escape death… anyway, can you bring it to me? Also, if you want, help me with one more thing.
Alright, I’ll go get your shotgun.
Not right now.
Here, take your gun—you were unlucky.
Thanks. Here, take this "flash" as a token of gratitude, I managed to find it in that anomaly. Get ready, come one night, and we’ll go to the factory.
Alright, I’m ready.
Great, I can’t wait to uncover all the secrets of this place. But stay alert, hopefully nothing will happen.
Yeah...

That’s always the case, you know? Almost died again and you saved me again. And there was nothing… The moral, man: rely only on objective, comprehensive info, make comparisons, and don’t live in rose-colored glasses. Ugh, damn it!
What next?
Will you give me the documents? I’ll keep them as a memento after the excursion. I can’t repay you, but I can be a good friend if you want to roam with me.
Here, take them, I don’t need them.
Are you kidding? I risked my life for you, three times. I’ll take them to the Bartender instead.
What else do you need help with?
Not long ago, another idiot from the village showed up. He kept mocking my appearance. Could you kill that bastard?
How am I supposed to kill him? If anyone finds out, they’ll rip my head off.

No one will know. I heard this jerk is looking for someone to explore the surroundings and loot. Just tell him you’re an experienced stalker, lead him to bandits or mutants, and leave him—let them tear him apart. Will you do it? No reward from me, just take his stuff if you want.
Alright, I’ll do it.
That’s too much, don’t you think? No.
Honestly, I’ve already been to the factory.
Come on, man, don’t lie. Do you have proof?
Yes, this is all I found there:
Nothing.
Wow… no miracles. Thanks for clarifying, and it looks dangerous there. I can’t repay you, except with my shotgun. Here, I don’t need it anymore:
Alright, don’t bother me.
Hey, you were looking for an experienced stalker to watch your back?
Hell yeah, hey. And you’re the experienced one, huh? Haha, don’t take it personally. I could take them all myself, but a partner is never useless. Let’s go?
Let’s go.
